'''tazasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:saagwala|saagwala]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saagwala|saagwala]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tazasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæzæshæth|tæzæshæth]] || [[word:tæzæshæj|tæzæshæj]] || [[word:tæzæshæsh|tæzæshæsh]] || [[word:tæzæshæ|tæzæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazazashath|tazazashath]] || [[word:tazazashaj|tazazashaj]] || [[word:tazazashash|tazazashash]] || [[word:tazazasha|tazazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazashath|tazashath]] || [[word:tazashaj|tazashaj]] || [[word:tazashash|tazashash]] || [[word:tazasha|tazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazafshath|tazafshath]] || [[word:tazafshaj|tazafshaj]] || [[word:tazafshash|tazafshash]] || [[word:tazafshaf|tazafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazashatha|tazashatha]] || [[word:tazashaja|tazashaja]] || [[word:tazashasha|tazashasha]] || [[word:tazashaka|tazashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazashath|tazashath]] || [[word:tazashaj|tazashaj]] || [[word:tazashash|tazashash]] || [[word:tazasha|tazasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazashathal|tazashathal]] || [[word:tazashajal|tazashajal]] || [[word:tazashashal|tazashashal]] || [[word:tazashakal|tazashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazashathatha|tazashathatha]] || [[word:tazashajaja|tazashajaja]] || [[word:tazashashasha|tazashashasha]] || [[word:tazashaka|tazashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazashathan|tazashathan]] || [[word:tazashajan|tazashajan]] || [[word:tazashashan|tazashashan]] || [[word:tazashakan|tazashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazashathaoro|tazashathaoro]] || [[word:tazashajaoro|tazashajaoro]] || [[word:tazashashaoro|tazashashaoro]] || [[word:tazashakaoro|tazashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
